title: Invalid SSL certificate prevents triggers from working
symptom: Triggers for Typeform and ActiveCampaign do not activate on a self-hosted n8n instance due to SSL issues. The same triggers work perfectly on n8n cloud.
root_cause: The SSL certificate validation failed because the Docker container was started before the DNS propagated, leading to an invalid certificate. This prevents external services from communicating with the n8n instance properly.
fix_steps: Verify that the SSL certificate is valid
agent_instruction: Check the SSL certificate validity and restart the n8n instance if necessary.
